use_cases: Animated hero section backgrounds for landing pages
Decorative flowing wave effects for SaaS product pages
Ambient animated backgrounds for media streaming interfaces
Eye-catching visual elements for e-commerce storefronts
ai_summary: Aurora Waves is a WebGL shader component that renders flowing, glowing aurora-like wave animations using the OGL library. Features customizable speed, glow intensity, and dark/light theme support with hardware-accelerated rendering. Creates mesmerizing animated gradients with deep blue to magenta color transitions, suitable for hero sections, landing pages, and decorative backgrounds where visual impact is paramount.
